args.Details: ordered_nodes, edge_pairs
[n IN visited | n.id] AS ordered_nodes, edges AS edge_pairs
next_frontier AS frontier, next_visited AS visited, next_edges AS edges
visited + next_frontier AS next_visited, edges + new_edges AS next_edges

reduce(acc = $autolist_12, n IN next_frontier_raw | CASE
  WHEN n IN acc THEN acc
  ELSE acc + [n]
END) AS next_frontier

CASE
  WHEN false THEN picked_nbrs
  ELSE [n IN picked_nbrs WHERE NOT n IN visited]
END AS next_frontier_raw
apoc.coll.flatten(anon_51) AS picked_nbrs, apoc.coll.flatten(anon_52) AS new_edges
next_frontier AS frontier, next_visited AS visited, next_edges AS edges
visited + next_frontier AS next_visited, edges + new_edges AS next_edges

reduce(acc = $autolist_7, n IN next_frontier_raw | CASE
  WHEN n IN acc THEN acc
  ELSE acc + [n]
END) AS next_frontier

CASE
  WHEN false THEN picked_nbrs
  ELSE [n IN picked_nbrs WHERE NOT n IN visited]
END AS next_frontier_raw
apoc.coll.flatten(anon_49) AS picked_nbrs, apoc.coll.flatten(anon_50) AS new_edges
$autolist_2 AS edges, collect(s) AS frontier, collect(s) AS visited
i ASC
$seed_ids[i] AS seed_id

RANGE INDEX s:Paper(id) WHERE id = seed_id

[rel IN picked_rels | [startNode(rel).id, endNode(rel).id]] AS new_edges, [rel IN picked_rels | startNode(rel)] AS picked_nbrs
i ASC

CASE
  WHEN false = false AND $autoint_5 >= size(cand_rels) THEN cand_rels

END AS picked_rels

[rel IN picked_rels | startNode(rel)] AS picked_nbrs, [rel IN picked_rels | [startNode(rel).id, endNode(rel).id]] AS new_edges
i ASC
